activity_log.event: Ember was fed. Hunger eased to 29. She breathed a tiny flame of satisfaction.
Played with Pebble. Bond strengthened to 85. Happiness maxed.
Ember collapsed after an exhausting flight. Energy fully depleted.
Ember soared high above the Cliffs of Aretia.
Fed Ember. Hunger eased from critical.
Pebble played hard, then crashed immediately after. Energy depleted.
Pebble was fed. Hunger dropped to 54.
Pebble twitched nervously under a storm cloud.
Played with Ember. Bond strengthened to 85.
Baby_EmbPeb went absolutely feral during play. Something got knocked over.
Baby_EmbPeb was fed. Thoroughly stuffed — hunger 12.
Baby_EmbPeb breathed a tiny puff of smoke. Very proud of herself.
Took a long nap curled in a nest of warm embers.
